tasks.label: 📌 Doctor: System + Ollama + VS Code
tasks.command: bash -lc 'set -e; echo "=== OS ==="; uname -a; echo; echo "=== VS Code CLI ==="; command -v code >/dev/null 2>&1 && code --version | head -n 1 || echo "code: not in PATH"; echo; echo "=== Ollama CLI ==="; command -v ollama >/dev/null 2>&1 && ollama --version || echo "ollama: not in PATH"; echo; echo "=== Ollama API ==="; curl -fsS http://localhost:11434/api/tags | head -n 40 || echo "Ollama API: no response"; echo; echo "=== Models (ollama list) ==="; command -v ollama >/dev/null 2>&1 && ollama list || true'

tasks.label: 🧪 Doctor: Git + Repo Health (this workspace)
tasks.command: bash -lc 'set -e; echo "=== PWD ==="; pwd; echo; echo "=== Git ==="; git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 && (git status -sb; echo; git fsck --full || true) || echo "No git repo here"'
